title: Testing, Debugging, and Quality Evidence
description: Verify the command-line data tool across pure logic, filesystem boundaries, failures, and changed inputs. Learners cumulatively produce a complete first version of a tested data-report release candidate while every earlier competency remains active through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Design tests from observable contracts, boundaries, and failure modes.
Use fixtures, parametrization, test doubles, and integration tests without coupling to implementation.
Debug from reproduction and evidence and measure coverage as a map, not a target.
